Dialog.ManageHintFood: Choose whether to record more food or clear today's food intake.
Dialog.ManageHintWater: Choose whether to record more water or clear today's water intake.
Dialog.FreshWaterHint: Drink from a fresh water source instead of consuming stored water.
Dialog.DropHint: Drag a consumable from this actor's inventory here to add it to the list.
Dialog.WarningDropDuplicate: That item is already available in this dialog.
Dialog.WarningDropEmpty: That item has no remaining quantity.
Dialog.WarningDropInvalid: Only consumables from this actor's inventory can be added here.
Dialog.WarningItemMissing: That item is no longer available.

Tracker.Title: Nutrition
Tracker.FoodNotRequiredTooltip: Food is not required for this actor.
Tracker.WaterNotRequiredTooltip: Water is not required for this actor.

Config.Title: Nutrition
Config.TrackFoodHint: Disable food tracking for actors that do not need to eat.
Config.TrackWaterHint: Disable water tracking for actors that do not need to drink.
Config.OverrideHint: Leave a field blank to use the actor's size-based default.

Rest.MalnutritionSaveHint: On a failed save, manually apply 1 level of &Reference[Exhaustion] and the &Reference[Malnutrition] condition.
